task:
Create /home/user/Documents/merged.txt by concatenating, in this exact order:

1. All 3 lines from /home/user/Documents/header.txt
2. One blank line as a separator
3. All 3 lines from /home/user/Documents/body.txt
4. One blank line as a separator
5. All 3 lines from /home/user/Documents/footer.txt

The final file must have exactly 11 lines (3 + 1 + 3 + 1 + 3). Line 1 must be the first line of header.txt (`REPORT HEADER`), and the body and footer content (e.g. `Main body paragraph one discusses the quarterly results.`, `Report Footer - Confidential`, `End of Document`) must all be present.

verification.description: Line 1 is the first line from header.txt

verification.command: check-file-contains /home/user/Documents/merged.txt "Main body paragraph one discusses the quarterly results."

verification.description: merged.txt contains last line of footer
